ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "ns" INTEGER /* Number of added lines */,
  "nd" INTEGER /* Number of deleted lines */,
  "nf" INTEGER /* Number of files modified */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the commit */,
  "la" INTEGER /* Lines added */,
  "ld" INTEGER /* Lines deleted */,
  "lt" REAL /* Lines touched */,
  "ndev" INTEGER /* Number of developers involved */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the commit */,
  "nuc" INTEGER /* Number of unique changes */,
  "exp" REAL /* Exponential complexity */,
  "rexp" REAL /* Recent exponential complexity */,
  "sexp" REAL /* Standard exponential complexity */,
  "TFC" INTEGER /* Number of files touched */,
  "is_doc" INTEGER /* Is the commit a document */,
  "is_build" INTEGER /* Is the commit a build */,
  "is_meta" INTEGER /* Is the commit metadata */,
  "is_media" INTEGER /* Is the commit media */,
  "is_src" INTEGER /* Is the commit source code */,
  "is_merge" INTEGER /* Is the commit a merge commit */,
  "FRM" INTEGER /* First commit */,
  "COM" INTEGER /* Commit complexity */,
  "CFT" INTEGER /* Commit feeling */,
  "classif" INTEGER /* Classification of the commit (e.g., bug fix, new feature, documentation update) */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "committer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committer */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date of last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_committer_id FOREIGN KEY ("committer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date of project creation */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date of last project update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_project_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_project_map_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_project_map_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the developer */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_tags_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date of comment creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_comments_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
column_names: Is the commit a merge commit
Classification of the commit (e.g., bug fix, new feature, documentation update)
